'''''Challenge'' 37''' was a roleplaying magazine published in [[1989]]. It contained an adventure for [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]] called ''[[Wookiees Amok]]'', written by [[Timothy M. Ryan]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}
